title: Michael S Barr: Deregulating in a financial boom - what could go wrong?
body:
Speech by Mr Michael S Barr, Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at the American University, Washington DC, 6 June 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260609c.htm

title: Michelle W Bowman: Supervision and regulation
body:
Speech by Ms Michelle W Bowman, Vice Chair for Supervision of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, before the Committee on Financial Services, US House of Representatives, Washington DC, 4 June 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260608b.htm
